1_boot_no_exceptions.details: Game initializes without import/attribute errors. Fuzion stats (PrimaryCharacteristics, DerivedCharacteristics, SkillSet) load correctly.

2_combat_end_to_end.details: 50+ attack actions vs mobs (goblin, orc, dragon) all execute without exceptions. Damage applied, defeat events fire when HP reaches 0. Hit rate 100% vs goblin/orc due to clamp_player_damage floor ensuring ≤4 hits to kill.

3_fuzion_dc_kd_sd_damage_path.details: CombatEvent fields (target_dv, d10_roll, total_roll, result, damage) are populated correctly. However, the actual damage calculation uses the legacy calculate_damage (Hero-System style with AV subtraction) rather than FuzionDamageCalculator (DC/Hits/Stun/KD/SD/ED). The FuzionDamageCalculator class exists and works when called directly, but CombatResolver.resolve_attack routes through combat_factors.calculate_damage which uses the old model. This is a known integration gap - P3 of the design calls for routing through FuzionDamageCalculator but the current code still uses the legacy path.

4_save_load_roundtrip.details: Save/load works for basic entity state (position, hp, stats, inventory). However, Fuzion-specific fields (characteristics, derived, skill_set) are NOT serialized in the current save format. The save version has not been bumped to v2 and migrate_v1_to_v2 is not implemented. This is a known gap per the design document (P3/P4).

5_hit_damage_band_vs_baseline.details: Baseline telemetry (playtest_telemetry.json): 175 attacks, 100% hit rate, avg damage 8.7 (range 6-11). Fuzion redesign test: 100% hit rate, avg damage 50-125 (clamped to floor ensuring ≤4 hits to kill). The clamp_player_damage floor is dominating - any hit deals at least monster_max_hp/4 damage. This is by design for balance but represents a significant deviation from the pre-Fuzion damage distribution.

recommendations: Complete P3: Route CombatResolver.resolve_attack damage calculation through FuzionDamageCalculator instead of combat_factors.calculate_damage
Complete P4: Implement save version v2 with migrate_v1_to_v2 for characteristics/skills
Verify Fuzion DC values in config/fuzion.yaml match weapon types
Consider whether clamp_player_damage floor is appropriate for Fuzion model or should be adjusted
